prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy anime key art portrait for PONYO. Use a tight close-up composition of one androgynous young warrior's face, partially hidden under an ornate raven-like metallic helmet and feathered armor. The character has pale warm skin, messy black hair strands falling across the face, and exactly two visible amber-brown human eyes staring intensely toward the viewer from under the helmet. The armor should look like layered bird feathers and carved bronze-gold metal plates, with scratched painterly texture, sharp talon-like contours, and exactly one prominent glowing red gem or mechanical bird eye set into the upper right side of the helmet. Include two prominent raven beak shapes: one long curved beak descending along the right edge of the face and one smaller beak form crossing the lower foreground near the mouth. Lighting is dramatic and cinematic: black background, deep shadows, molten orange rim light, golden highlights sparkling across the feather plates, small ember-like reflections, high contrast chiaroscuro. Style should be highly detailed painterly anime illustration, concept art quality, moody, elegant, ominous, with warm bronze, amber, black, and red color palette. At the bottom center, add the title text PONYO in large glowing pale-gold gothic fantasy lettering with sharp vertical strokes, integrated into the image without a border or watermark.
